understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by positioning all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+'). The game is won when every goal is covered simultaneously, using limited steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement of pieces is controlled by clicking on a target tile (CLICK action). If the selected piece can reach that tile (path unobstructed by walls or other obstacles), it moves there instantly. MOVE actions likely move a cursor or player avatar, but CLICK directly teleports a piece to the clicked tile. Obstacles and other pieces block movement. The run showed that repeated CLICK on [35,17] failed because the tile was blocked or unreachable.
